problems.cause: AGREE annex parser expects the entire annex block to be syntactically closed before EOF; the function declarations are valid but the validator is likely failing due to a hidden syntax issue, possibly from an unclosed brace or trailing content.
problems.minimal_edit: Ensure the annex block ends with a closing double-asterisk and semicolon: **};

executor_steps: Verify the annex block in Supervisor.impl ends with the exact sequence: **};
Confirm no trailing characters or comments exist after the closing **};
Revalidate the AGREE annex syntax with the corrected closing sequence.
